role: Evidence artifact proving that a live federation handshake has occurred under declared conditions.

constraints.name: Adapter linkage
constraints.rule: adapterId MUST reference a verified adapter in adapter-contract-registry.json / adapter-contract-evidence-index.json.

constraints.name: Transport linkage
constraints.rule: transportId MUST reference a declared transport descriptor with tested=true and maturity Tested (trials) or Certified (production).

constraints.name: Maturity consistency
constraints.rule: constitutionalMaturity MUST be compatible with the remote's project-infi lineage when lineage is observed.

constraints.name: Hash integrity
constraints.rule: receiptHash MUST match the serialized receipt payload (sha256 of canonical payload without receiptHash).

constraints.name: Time validity
constraints.rule: Current time MUST lie between issuedAt and expiresAt for the receipt to be considered valid.

constraints.name: Revocation requirement
constraints.rule: revocationPath MUST NOT be empty; every receipt must have a revocation mechanism.

truthBoundary: A handshake receipt proves a specific live session handshake under declared adapter and transport conditions. It does not permanently federate a remote beyond the receipt validity window.
